---
title: 'John 11: Moved By The Holy Spirit'
date: '2013-04-19T11:04:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '3107275316214214500'
blogger_filename: '/2013/04/john-11-moved-by-holy-spirit.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Daily Reading'
---

<h4>COME:</h4><b><a href="https://www.youversion.com/bible/107/jhn.11.net" target="_blank">John 11</a></b><br /><blockquote class="tr_bq">33 When Jesus saw her weeping, and the people who had come with her weeping, he was intensely moved in spirit and greatly distressed. 34 He asked, “Where have you laid him?” They replied, “Lord, come and see.” 35 Jesus wept. 36 Thus the people who had come to mourn said, “Look how much he loved him!” 37 But some of them said, “This is the man who caused the blind man to see!&nbsp;Couldn't&nbsp;he have done something to keep Lazarus from dying?” 38 Jesus, intensely moved again, came to the tomb. (Now it was a cave, and a stone was placed across it.) 39 Jesus said, “Take away the stone. </blockquote><b><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/passage.aspx?q=john+11:33-39&amp;t=kjv" target="_blank">KVJ Onterlinear</a></b><br /><blockquote class="tr_bq"><span class="versenum" style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; line-height: 20px; margin: 0px 3px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">33</span><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=5613" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">When</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=2424" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">Jesus</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=3767" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">therefore</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=1492" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">saw</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=846" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">her</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=2799" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">weeping</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;,&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=2532" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">and</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;the&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=2453" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">Jews</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;also&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=2799" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">weeping</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;which&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=4905" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">came</a>&nbsp;<span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">with&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=846" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">her,</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;he&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=1690" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">groaned</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;in the&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=4151" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">spirit,</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=2532" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">and</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;was&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=5015" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">troubled</a>&nbsp;</blockquote><blockquote class="tr_bq"><span class="versenum" style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; line-height: 20px; margin: 0px 3px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">38</span><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=2424" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">Jesus</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=3767" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">therefore</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=3825" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">again</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=1690" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">groaning</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=1722" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">in</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=1438" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">himself</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=2064" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">cometh</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=1519" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">to</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;the&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=3419" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">grave</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=1161" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">*</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">. It&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=2258" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">was</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;a&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=4693" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">cave,</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=2532" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">and</a>&nbsp;<span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">a&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=3037" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">stone</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=1945" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">lay</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=1909" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">upon</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/strongs.ashx?ll=g&amp;t=kjv&amp;sn=846" style="background-color: white; color: #336699; font-family: arial; font-size: 16px; line-height: 20px; text-decoration: none;">it.</a></blockquote><br /><h4>HEAR:</h4><br />This word "Groan" has always struck me as odd. It's mentioned twice here. What's very interesting&nbsp;is what it means and where else it's used.<br /><blockquote class="tr_bq">Groan - <a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/lexicons/greek/kjv/embrimaomai.html" target="_blank">Embrimaomai</a><br />It derives from Brimaomai: "To snort with anger" and it means to charge with earnest admonition,&nbsp;sternly&nbsp;to charge, or threaten to enjoin.&nbsp;</blockquote><a href="http://www.blueletterbible.org/lang/lexicon/lexicon.cfm?strongs=G1690&amp;t=NIV" target="_blank">Blue Letter Bible Lexicon</a> says that it&nbsp;appears&nbsp;in these five verses in the NT:<br /><blockquote class="tr_bq"><br /><table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" id="table_bible" style="font-family: 'trebuchet ms', arial, helvetica; width: 100%px;"><tbody><tr id="Mat_9_30_938030"><td class="vRefa" style="background-color: white; border-color: rgb(221, 221, 221); border-style: solid; border-width: 1px 0px 0px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: bold; padding: 5px; vertical-align: top; width: 70px;"><span class="nowrap" style="white-space: nowrap;"><img class="copyBox" name="copyThisVerse_1" src="http://www.blueletterbible.org/gifs/copyChkboxOff.gif" style="border: 0px; cursor: pointer; margin: 0px 4px 0px 0px;" title="Select for Copy; Double click to (de-)select all" /><a href="http://www.blueletterbible.org/Bible.cfm?b=Mat&amp;c=9&amp;v=30&amp;t=NIV#30" style="color: #324395; text-decoration: none;">Mat 9:30</a></span></td><td class="vDispa" style="background-color: white; border-color: rgb(221, 221, 221); border-style: solid; border-width: 1px 0px 0px; font-size: 13px; padding: 5px; vertical-align: top;">and their sight was restored. Jesus warned them sternly, "See that no one knows about this."</td></tr><tr id="Mar_1_43_958043"><td class="vRefb" style="background-color: whitesmoke; border-color: rgb(221, 221, 221); border-style: solid; border-width: 1px 0px 0px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: bold; padding: 5px; vertical-align: top; width: 70px;"><span class="nowrap" style="white-space: nowrap;"><img class="copyBox" name="copyThisVerse_2" src="http://www.blueletterbible.org/gifs/copyChkboxOff.gif" style="border: 0px; cursor: pointer; margin: 0px 4px 0px 0px;" title="Select for Copy; Double click to (de-)select all" /><a href="http://www.blueletterbible.org/Bible.cfm?b=Mar&amp;c=1&amp;v=43&amp;t=NIV#43" style="color: #324395; text-decoration: none;">Mar 1:43</a></span></td><td class="vDispb" style="background-color: whitesmoke; border-color: rgb(221, 221, 221); border-style: solid; border-width: 1px 0px 0px; font-size: 13px; padding: 5px; vertical-align: top;">Jesus sent him away at once with a strong warning:</td></tr><tr id="Mar_14_5_971005"><td class="vRefa" style="background-color: white; border-color: rgb(221, 221, 221); border-style: solid; border-width: 1px 0px 0px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: bold; padding: 5px; vertical-align: top; width: 70px;"><span class="nowrap" style="white-space: nowrap;"><img class="copyBox" name="copyThisVerse_3" src="http://www.blueletterbible.org/gifs/copyChkboxOff.gif" style="border: 0px; cursor: pointer; margin: 0px 4px 0px 0px;" title="Select for Copy; Double click to (de-)select all" /><a href="http://www.blueletterbible.org/Bible.cfm?b=Mar&amp;c=14&amp;v=5&amp;t=NIV#5" style="color: #324395; text-decoration: none;">Mar 14:5</a></span></td><td class="vDispa" style="background-color: white; border-color: rgb(221, 221, 221); border-style: solid; border-width: 1px 0px 0px; font-size: 13px; padding: 5px; vertical-align: top;">It could have been sold for more than a year's wages and the money given to the poor." And they rebuked her harshly.</td></tr><tr id="Jhn_11_33_1008033"><td class="vRefb" style="background-color: whitesmoke; border-color: rgb(221, 221, 221); border-style: solid; border-width: 1px 0px 0px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: bold; padding: 5px; vertical-align: top; width: 70px;"><span class="nowrap" style="white-space: nowrap;"><img class="copyBox" name="copyThisVerse_4" src="http://www.blueletterbible.org/gifs/copyChkboxOff.gif" style="border: 0px; cursor: pointer; margin: 0px 4px 0px 0px;" title="Select for Copy; Double click to (de-)select all" /><a href="http://www.blueletterbible.org/Bible.cfm?b=Jhn&amp;c=11&amp;v=33&amp;t=NIV#33" style="color: #324395; text-decoration: none;">Jhn 11:33</a></span></td><td class="vDispb" style="background-color: whitesmoke; border-color: rgb(221, 221, 221); border-style: solid; border-width: 1px 0px 0px; font-size: 13px; padding: 5px; vertical-align: top;">When Jesus saw her weeping, and the Jews who had come along with her also weeping, he was deeply moved in spirit and troubled.</td></tr><tr id="Jhn_11_38_1008038"><td class="vRefa" style="background-color: white; border-color: rgb(221, 221, 221); border-style: solid; border-width: 1px 0px 0px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: bold; padding: 5px; vertical-align: top; width: 70px;"><span class="nowrap" style="white-space: nowrap;"><img class="copyBox" name="copyThisVerse_5" src="http://www.blueletterbible.org/gifs/copyChkboxOff.gif" style="border: 0px; cursor: pointer; margin: 0px 4px 0px 0px;" title="Select for Copy; Double click to (de-)select all" /><a href="http://www.blueletterbible.org/Bible.cfm?b=Jhn&amp;c=11&amp;v=38&amp;t=NIV#38" style="color: #324395; text-decoration: none;">Jhn 11:38</a></span></td><td class="vDispa" style="background-color: white; border-color: rgb(221, 221, 221); border-style: solid; border-width: 1px 0px 0px; font-size: 13px; padding: 5px; vertical-align: top;">Jesus, once more deeply moved, came to the tomb. It was a cave with a stone laid across the entrance.</td></tr></tbody></table></blockquote>I've always had the idea that it just meant Jesus was moved with compassion and sad because His friends were sad. Indeed, that could be true because the bible says that he is our High Priest and he is understanding of our weaknesses, having experienced these intense emotions himself while on earth.<br /><br />While all of that may be true it's not what the word means. It's the same word used to describe Judas' outburst over this same Mary pouring expensive oil over Jesus. Interesting that this word's use now again involved Mary.<br /><br />So, Jesus is "mad", so to speak. I read where it's used and what it means and I get the picture of a Parent turning to children who are getting out of line and saying "Stop it!"<br /><br />But verse 33 also says his spirit was "Troubled" this is the Greek word <a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/lexicons/greek/kjv/tarasso.html" target="_blank">Tarasso</a>. It means to: "Agitate, cause inward commotion, or to stir up" It's generally used to talk about the person who is agitated by fear and dread. Of course it's impossible for Jesus to be afraid. <a href="http://bible.cc/1_john/4-18.htm" target="_blank">Perfected Love</a> casts out fear and Jesus IS perfect Love himself.<br /><br />I feel that this agitation was of the Holy Spirit. He already knew before He ever came that He would be raising&nbsp;Lazarus&nbsp;from the dead. He basically told Martha that when He first Got there. Martha figured Jesus was talking about a far off someday, not here and now.<br /><br />Jesus also knew that His own time was short, and He would eventually be trading places with Lazarus. Very soon HE would be dying and getting wrapped and put into a tomb and then have to come out of it. This has to be on His mind as He was dealing this hear and now.<br /><br />I feel that Jesus was moved by all of these things. This agitation of Spirit that caused a stern response was the Holy Spirit in Him moving Him to action. You don't just walk up nonchalantly&nbsp;to a tomb and ask politely: "Please come back from the dead?"<br /><br />It was the Holy Spirit Himself moving to action within Jesus. This was the Gifts of the Spirit, as laid out in 1 Cor 12, coming to life before our eyes.<br /><br />I feel like there is a conclusion to this... but I don't know what it is. So I'll let you make it for yourself...<br /><br /><h4>DO:</h4>As for me? I'm going to pay more attention to the leading of the Holy Spirit today in the little things. That way I can be used by Him in the big things.<br /><br /><br /><br /><b>How about you? You see anything to add to this? Want to share what examples you have seen or experience in yourself or others? Comment below.&nbsp;</b><br /><div><b><br /></b></div><br /><b><br class="Apple-interchange-newline" />I call you empowered 2 prosper with good success!</b><br /><b><br /></b><b>N2 Good Success</b><b><span style="font-size: x-small;">Darrell G. Wolfe</span></b><br />Blog:&nbsp;<a href="http://empoweredtooprosper.blogspot.com/" style="background-color: white;" target="_blank">http://empoweredtooprosper.blogspot.com/</a><br />Facebook:&nbsp;<a href="https://www.facebook.com/pages/Empowered-To-Prosper/231019763613118" target="_blank">Facebook.Com/EmpoweredTooProsper</a><br />Twitter:&nbsp;<a href="http://twitter.com/n2goodsuccess" target="_blank">http://twitter.com/n2goodsuccess</a><br /><br /><b style="background-color: white;">See Also:</b><br />Books by Darrell G. Wolfe:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.amazon.com/Darrell-Wolfe/e/B008F07FO6" style="font-family: verdana, arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 13px;" target="_blank">Amazon.com/author/darrellgwolfe&nbsp;</a><br />Book Suggestions from the&nbsp;<a href="http://astore.amazon.com/your0f4d-20/190-6424964-9305846" target="_blank">N2 Good Success Amazon Store</a><br />Brand and Product Offerings from&nbsp;<a href="http://www.zazzle.com/n2goodsuccess" target="_blank">N2 Good Success Zazzle Store</a>
